tasks_completed.description: Untrack .review/schedule.json from git index in knowledge-system-jade
tasks_completed.changes: git rm --cached .review/schedule.json — file removed from git index, still present on disk
tasks_completed.rationale: .gitignore already has .review/ pattern; file was committed before the rule existed. git rm --cached removes it from the index without deleting from disk.

tasks_completed.description: Untrack chats/index.json from git index in knowledge-system-jade
tasks_completed.changes: git rm --cached chats/index.json — file removed from git index, still present on disk
tasks_completed.rationale: .gitignore already has chats/ pattern; file was committed before the rule existed. git rm --cached removes it from the index without deleting from disk.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — files were committed to the index before the .review/ and chats/ .gitignore patterns were added
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Repos grew organically; .gitignore rules were added after initial commits, leaving previously-tracked files stuck in the index despite the exclusion patterns now existing
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: git rm --cached removes the files from the git index without touching the working tree. Once untracked, the existing .gitignore patterns prevent re-introduction.

dev.qa_notes: Run: cd /root/knowledge-system-jade && git ls-files .review/schedule.json chats/index.json — output must be empty. Also verify files still exist on disk: test -f .review/schedule.json && echo exists.

self_verification.notes: git ls-files .review/schedule.json chats/index.json returned empty (both untracked). test -f confirmed both files still present on disk.
